<!-- downloads-table -->
# Which file do I download?

| Your system | Download |
| --- | --- |
| Any Linux distro | `.AppImage` — runs anywhere, no install |
| Debian / Ubuntu / Mint / Pop!_OS | `.deb` (integrates with your package manager) |
| Fedora / RHEL / openSUSE | `.rpm` (integrates with your package manager) |
| Windows 10 / 11 | `.msi` (installer) or `.exe` (portable, no install) |
| macOS 14 (Sonoma) or later | `.dmg` |

Match the file to your CPU: `x86_64` / `amd64` / `x64` = Intel/AMD, `aarch64` / `arm64` = ARM (including Apple Silicon).
